description: A young female adventurer at the very start of her journey, before she has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how she looks before any equipment is picked up, stripped down to only the base layer worn beneath armor. Extremely tough, self-assured and powerfully confident, with a fierce, determined expression and a commanding, unshakable posture. Sharp intense eyes, dark brown hair, and a lean, athletic, toned build that shows real strength and agility. Her stance is grounded, strong and self-assured — shoulders back, chin level, radiating quiet badass energy. She is completely unequipped and undressed, stripped down to ONLY a simple plain two-piece cloth undergarment — a plain cloth band/wrap top and simple briefs, like a minimal bikini base layer — muted and understated, colored ONLY in brown, black, grey and white. ABSOLUTELY NO BLUE anywhere on the character — no blue cloth, no denim, no navy, no teal, no cyan; no other colors at all, strictly brown, black, grey and white only. Nothing else at all: no shirt, no tunic, no trousers, no shorts, no dress, no costume. She has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. Her hands are completely bare — absolutely no gloves, no wraps, no bracers, nothing on the hands or wrists. Her feet are completely bare — barefoot, no shoes, no boots, no sandals, no socks, no wraps, nothing on the feet or ankles. She still looks cool, memorable, capable and genuinely badass through her fierce determined face, dark brown hair and commanding posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
